message:
fix: egraph budget overflow protection and dead code removal

- Use saturating_mul in SaturationConfig::for_graph to prevent overflow
  for large node_count values (>6500 would overflow on 50*n*n)
- Remove unused BudgetType::Saturated enum variant (natural completion
  returns None for budget_exhausted, not a Saturated variant)
- Add tests for for_graph formula, clamping, and overflow handling
- Add tests for budget exhaustion reporting (node/iteration limits)
- Add tests for interactive/batch config presets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
